global_description: A small, slender songbird with a streamlined body and a long tail. It features a brown upper body with a white underbelly and a distinctive white eye stripe. The wings and tail are dark brown with lighter edges, and the legs are pinkish.
discriminative_attributes: Dark brown wings with lighter edges

part_details.head: Small, rounded with a prominent white eye stripe and brown crown.
part_details.body: Streamlined with brown upper parts and white underparts.
part_details.wings: Dark brown with lighter edges, medium length.
part_details.tail: Long, dark brown with lighter edges.

spatial_relations: The white eye stripe runs from the beak to the back of the head.
The brown upper body transitions to a white underbelly.
The wings are attached to the sides of the body, extending outwards.
